target: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct Q8_0 frontend/WebUI exact-row gating
retained_reason: Adds regression coverage proving a runtime-ready 3B Q8_0 row remains chat-blocked unless /api/capabilities advertises an exact supported compatibility status, while still surfacing loaded_now/generation_ready and the exact unpromoted row label.

local_gates.command: npm run smoke:integration && npm run smoke:model-state && npm run smoke:ui && npm run build

remote_backend_check.command: ssh canonical Ubuntu host then curl /v1/health and /api/capabilities on 127.0.0.1:8181
remote_backend_check.blocker: SSH reached host, but local Camelid API was not listening on 127.0.0.1:8181 during this slice.

support_contract_guard: No support/README/API/frontend claim is widened; the new test is a fail-closed guard for downgraded 3B capabilities rows.
